title: IBM Data Science Certification
description:
Data Science Foundations: Gained a deep understanding of what data science is, the methodology behind it, and the professional tools used in the field (Jupyter Notebooks, RStudio, and IBM Cloud Pak for Data).

Programming Mastery: Developed proficiency in Python for data manipulation, including libraries like Pandas, NumPy, and Matplotlib.

Data Management: Learned to work with relational databases using SQL to extract and analyze data.

Analytical Techniques: Mastered data analysis (Wrangling, Exploratory Data Analysis) and high-level Data Visualization using Seaborn and Folium.

Machine Learning: Built, evaluated, and deployed Machine Learning models using Scikit-learn, covering regression, classification, and clustering.

Generative AI Integration: Gained insights into leveraging Generative AI to accelerate a data science career.

title: IBM - Data Science Certificate
description:
